value.name: web-ks-hotel-live-test-1006627
value.description:
Web (public) - Call only if internal / private indexes cannot confidently satisfy the query AND one or more of:
 - Fresh / time-varying info (news, versions, active research, sports, market/policy updates)
 - Local / geo-specific details (regulations, services, events, logistics)
 - Public entity facts (people, orgs, teams, stats, rosters)
 - High-risk or precision domains (medical, legal, financial, safety, scientific metrics)
 - Explicit sourcing / verification / citation requested
 - Recent public quantitative metrics / rankings / tables

Cost note: Expensive (latency, tokens, rate limits). Always attempt internal grounding first; escalate only when freshness, coverage, or citation needs justify the external call.
